headline: Public Storage to Acquire Public Storage Canada in Strategic Entry into Major Canadian Markets
summary: FRISCO, Texas, June 22, 2026--Public Storage (NYSE: PSA) ("Public Storage" or the "Company"), the largest owner of self-storage facilities, today announced that its operating partnership, Public Storage OP, L.P. ("Public Storage OP"), and Public Storage Operating Company ("PSOC") have entered into an agreement to acquire Public Storage Canada ("PS Canada") in a transaction valued at approximately $1.2 billion USD ($1.67 billion CAD).
